name: Feature Request

## Problem

What problem does this solve? (e.g., "I need to...")

## Proposed Solution

How should it work? Include example commands if applicable:

```bash
hive <your-proposed-command>
```

## Alternatives Considered

Other approaches you've thought about.

## Additional Context

Links, screenshots, or references to similar tools.
